scenes.narration: Founded in 2023, Retenzy is an all-in-one platform designed for Shopify e-commerce brands to optimize Customer Lifetime Value by turning one-time buyers into loyal advocates.
scenes.visual: A smartphone showing a Shopify store transitioning a shopper into a VIP loyal member.

scenes.narration: The platform integrates loyalty programs and referrals, allowing merchants to create custom tiered VIP memberships, reward points, and referral networks that drive organic brand growth.
scenes.visual: An infographic displaying points, VIP tiers, and referral links connecting different users.

scenes.narration: Retenzy automates social proof by collecting photo and video reviews via email and SMS, which seamlessly sync with Google Shopping to boost search engine visibility.
scenes.visual: A laptop screen showcasing product reviews syncing automatically with Google search results.

scenes.narration: With over fifteen pre-built, no-code widgets and automated email flows, Retenzy simplifies retention marketing, helping merchants easily scale their customer engagement.
scenes.visual: A dashboard showing drag-and-drop widgets and automated email flowcharts.
